name: JD Vance
summary: Day 54 Tuesday AM. VANCE ARRIVED ISLAMABAD OVERNIGHT APRIL 20-21 LEADING US DELEGATION WITH WITKOFF AND KUSHNER [CONFIRMED 5-source: Express Tribune, ANI, Times of Israel, Bloomberg, Tribune India]. Pakistani mediators led by PM Sharif and Army Chief Munir established 'Red Zone' security perimeter. US delegation inside perimeter awaiting Iranian counterparty. Iran publicly refused Round 2 (Baghaei); Al Jazeera citing Iranian sources (SINGLE-SOURCE, REPORTED) flags Tuesday Iranian delegation arrival possibly including Ghalibaf/Araghchi. Dar-Araghchi call Tuesday AM (Pakistan Today) continues channel-level engagement replicating Monday Pezeshkian-Sharif pattern. Historic format-achievement from Round 1 intact (first US-Iran principals in same room since 1979). Nuclear-enrichment impasse binding: US 20-yr pause vs Iran 5-yr; Witkoff 'zero enrichment' red line unchanged. Wednesday ceasefire April 22 expiry = binary forcing function.
